title: Vanilla Ascended
description: A 250+ mods Vanilla Plus Minecraft Experience
body:
**Warning this modpack is in _BETA_ so expect some bugs and glitches!**
> Making a vanilla plus modpack for forge is harder than for fabric but i did everything i could to deliver the best minecraft experience for this version.

## Description:

> Vanilla Ascended is a carefully crafted vanilla plus Minecraft 1.20.1 Forge modpack built to make Minecraft feel a higher quality game than it is.
> 
> This pack improves visuals, mechanics, and general gameplay while keeping the world, style, and pacing true to the base game. Every mod is handpicked to enhance the experience without bloating it with hundreds of new blocks or biomes that feel out of place.
> 
> From smoother animations and improved lighting to smarter mobs, refined crafting, and subtle quality-of-life tweaks, Vanilla Ascended aims to touch every aspect of the game without losing its heart.
> 
### Key Features:

- Visual Upgrades – Better lighting, atmosphere, and subtle texture improvements that stay true to Minecraft’s style.

- Performance Boosts – Optimizations and tweaks for a smoother, more responsive game, even with shaders.

- Refined Mechanics – Balanced changes to combat, farming, and exploration to keep gameplay fresh yet familiar.

- Polished Gameplay – Quality-of-life improvements that feel like natural extensions of vanilla features.

- Seamless World Integration – Minimal new blocks or biomes, yet a larger scale of the Minecraft Worlds that are fresher.

- Casual Experience - I wanted to create a modpack that is visually appealing and great for any audience that wants to try out a new Minecraft experience.

If you’ve ever wanted the perfected version of Minecraft — one that’s instantly familiar but endlessly replayable — Vanilla Ascended is for you.
